codeReview.summary: The fix feature adequately addresses all 5 blocking issues from the prior review. The worker read the actual source files (InvoiceSettlementPolicy.java, InvoiceService.java, SalesFulfillmentService.java, AccountingFacade.java), identified the truth discrepancies, and made targeted corrections to docs/modules/invoice.md without broadening the packet scope. All changes are accurate against the source code.

summary: PASS — All 5 original blocking issues have been correctly resolved. (1) Invoice lifecycle table now lists DRAFT, ISSUED, PARTIAL, PAID, VOID, REVERSED matching InvoiceSettlementPolicy.InvoiceStatus exactly. (2) Fabricated InvoiceService.settleInvoice() replaced with real InvoiceSettlementPolicy.applyPayment()/applySettlement(). (3) Fabricated AccountingFacade.postPaymentJournal() removed; replaced with accurate statement about internal settlement services. (4) SettlementApprovalDecision and SettlementApprovalReasonCode correctly reclassified as value types inside InvoiceSettlementPolicy (confirmed: they are a record and enum in the same package, used exclusively by InvoiceSettlementPolicy). (5) postSalesJournal correctly attributed to SalesFulfillmentService with accurate note about issueInvoice=true disabling it. The worker also fixed the invoice status list in the Invoice List section to use the correct enum values. The fix is narrow and truth-aligned — no scope broadening, no new inaccuracies introduced. Lint passed.
